title: Machine Learning Lead
description: Lead the ML team in building recommendation systems and predictive analytics pipelines. Requires strong hands-on ML experience and team management skills.

title: Frontend Engineering Manager
description: Manage a team of 8 frontend engineers building the customer-facing web portal. Must have deep React expertise and people management experience.

title: Regional Sales Head — South India
description: Own the entire South India sales region. Build and manage a team of 15+ sales executives and hit quarterly revenue targets.

title: Customer Experience Analyst
description: Analyze customer support tickets to identify patterns, reduce resolution times, and improve customer satisfaction scores.

title: HR Analytics Specialist
description: Build dashboards and reports to help HR leadership make data-driven decisions about workforce planning, retention, and engagement.

title: Cloud Infrastructure Engineer
description: Design and maintain cloud infrastructure on AWS/GCP. Ensure 99.9% uptime for all production services and manage CI/CD pipelines.
